title: Cuneiform Tablet #0929: Neo-Babylonian Divinatory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Babylonian period. Divinatory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records divinatory matters typical of Neo-Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
